blocks.text: ♟️ 18:45 — Carlsen opens Grenke Chess Freestyle Open R1, Karlsruhe

Barcelona face Atlético Madrid twice in four days — La Liga title on the line Saturday, Champions League on Wednesday. Same opponents, two trophies, the biggest double-header of the Spanish football calendar.
🎾 Sun — Rolex Monte-Carlo Masters begins, clay season opens
🎮 Mon 02:00 — PGL CS2 Major Bucharest 2026 kicks off — rain (NOR) is the headline act
